title: PVP: Blade Of Miquella
description: Blade of Miquella PvP resource pack changes the textures and models of many items and blocks related to PvP and beyond
body: # ⚔️ Blade of Miquella PvP This resource pack overhauls the textures and models of many items and blocks related to PvP and beyond, adding high-quality custom animations and a striking custom sky. --- ### 🌟 Key Features * **Visual Overhaul:** Redesigned textures and models for crucial PvP items and blocks. * **Animated Items:** Custom, fluid animations for the **Totem of Undying, Golden Apple, Enchanted Golden Apple, and Ender Pearl**. * **OptiFine Integration:** Adds a beautiful custom sky (check images 1 & 2). * **1.16.5 Exclusive:** Includes a fully redesigned Custom GUI specifically for 1.16.5 players. --- ### 📦 Supported Versions | Minecraft | Status | Note | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **1.16.5** | ✅ Supported | Includes the exclusive Custom GUI | | **1.17.x - 1.21.1** | ✅ Supported | Full support | --- ### ❓ FAQ **Do I need OptiFine for this to work?** The base textures, models, and item animations work perfectly in vanilla Minecraft. OptiFine is strictly required if you want to see the custom sky. **FabricSkyBoxes is not supported and will not work.** **Can I use this in my YouTube videos or modpacks?** Yes. You are free to use this resource pack in your content or public modpacks.
